title: BYOH Task Output
description: JSON payload written by agent containers to stdout (ephemeral mode) or POSTed to .../tasks/:id/complete (persistent mode).

taskId.description: Must match the taskId from the corresponding BYOH Task Input.

result.description: Task output produced by the agent. null when the task failed and an error is present.

error.description: Human-readable error message describing why the task failed. Omit or set to null on success.

examples.result: The README describes a Docker-native multi-agent AI orchestration platform called SERA.

examples.error: LLM proxy returned 429: token budget exhausted for this agent instance
